节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides methods for sending and processing in-process events.
Subscribes to an event in persistent manner and executes a callback after the event is received.
注释信息: @param { InnerEvent } event - Event to subscribe to in persistent manner. The EventPriority parameter is not required and does not take effect.
@param { Callback<EventData> } callback - Callback to be executed when the event is received.

parameters.说明: Event to subscribe to in persistent manner. The EventPriority parameter is not required and does not take effect.
Callback to be executed when the event is received.

节点.功能描述: Subscribes to an event in persistent manner and executes a callback after the event is received.
注释信息: @param { string } eventId - Event to subscribe to in persistent manner. The value cannot be an empty string and exceed 10240 bytes.
@param { Callback<EventData> } callback - Callback to be executed when the event is received.

parameters.说明: Event to subscribe to in persistent manner. The value cannot be an empty string and exceed 10240 bytes.
Callback to be executed when the event is received.

节点.功能描述: Subscribes to an event in persistent manner and executes a callback after the event is received.
注释信息: @param { string } eventId - Event to subscribe to in persistent manner. The value cannot be an empty string and exceed 10240 bytes.
@param { Callback<GenericEventData<T>> } callback - Callback to be executed when the event is received.

节点.功能描述: Subscribe to a event by specific id in persistent manner and receives the event callback.
注释信息: @param { string } eventId - indicate ID of the event to subscribe to.
@param { Callback<EventData> | Callback<GenericEventData<T>> } callback - indicate callback used to receive the event.

节点.功能描述: Subscribes to an event in one-shot manner and unsubscribes from it after the event callback is executed.
注释信息: @param { InnerEvent } event - Event to subscribe to in one-shot manner. The EventPriority parameter is not required and does not take effect.
@param { Callback<EventData> } callback - Callback to be executed when the event is received.

parameters.说明: Event to subscribe to in one-shot manner. The EventPriority parameter is not required and does not take effect.
Callback to be executed when the event is received.

节点.功能描述: Subscribes to an event in one-shot manner and unsubscribes from it after the event callback is executed.
注释信息: @param { string } eventId - Event to subscribe to in one-shot manner. The value cannot be an empty string and exceed 10240 bytes.
@param { Callback<EventData> } callback - Callback to be executed when the event is received.

parameters.说明: Event to subscribe to in one-shot manner. The value cannot be an empty string and exceed 10240 bytes.
Callback to be executed when the event is received.

节点.功能描述: Subscribes to an event in one-shot manner and unsubscribes from it after the event callback is executed.
注释信息: @param { string } eventId - Event to subscribe to in one-shot manner. The value cannot be an empty string and exceed 10240 bytes.
@param { Callback<GenericEventData<T>> } callback - Callback to be executed when the event is received.

节点.功能描述: Unsubscribes from all events with the specified event ID.

parameters.说明: Event ID.

节点.功能描述: Unsubscribes from all events with the specified event ID.
注释信息: @param { string } eventId - Event ID. The value cannot be an empty string and exceed 10240 bytes.

parameters.说明: Event ID. The value cannot be an empty string and exceed 10240 bytes.

节点.功能描述: Unsubscribes from an event with the specified event ID and processed by the specified callback. This API takes effect only when Callback<EventData> has been registered through the on or once API. Otherwise, no processing is performed.

parameters.说明: Event ID.
Callback to unregister.

节点.功能描述: Unsubscribes from an event with the specified event ID and processed by the specified callback. This API takes effect only when Callback<EventData> has been registered through the on or once API. Otherwise, no processing is performed.
注释信息: @param { string } eventId - Event ID. The value cannot be an empty string and exceed 10240 bytes.

parameters.说明: Event ID. The value cannot be an empty string and exceed 10240 bytes.
Callback to unregister.

节点.功能描述: Unsubscribes from an event with the specified event ID and processed by the specified callback. This API takes effect only when Callback<EventData> has been registered through the on or once API. Otherwise, no processing is performed.
注释信息: @param { string } eventId - Event ID. The value cannot be an empty string and exceed 10240 bytes.

节点.功能描述: Unsubscribe specified callback function  from an event.
注释信息: @param { string } eventId - indicates ID of the event to unsubscribe from.
@param { Callback<EventData> | Callback<GenericEventData<T>> } callback - indicates callback used to receive the event.

节点.功能描述: Emits the specified event.
注释信息: @param { InnerEvent } event - Event to emit, where EventPriority specifies the emit priority of the event.
@param { EventData } [data] - Data passed in the event.

parameters.说明: Event to emit, where EventPriority specifies the emit priority of the event.
EventData } [data] - Data passed in the event.

节点.功能描述: Emits the specified event.
注释信息: @param { string } eventId - ID of the event to emit. The value cannot be an empty string and exceed 10240 bytes.
@param { EventData } [data] - Data passed in the event.

parameters.说明: ID of the event to emit. The value cannot be an empty string and exceed 10240 bytes.
EventData } [data] - Data passed in the event.

节点.功能描述: Emits the specified event.
注释信息: @param { string } eventId - ID of the event to emit. The value cannot be an empty string and exceed 10240 bytes.
@param { GenericEventData<T> } [data] - Data passed in the event.

节点.功能描述: Emits an event by specific id to the event queue.
注释信息: @param { string } eventId - indicate ID of the event to emit.
@param { EventData | GenericEventData<T> } [data] - indicate data carried by the event.

节点.功能描述: Emits an event of a specified priority.
注释信息: @param { string } eventId - ID of the event to emit. The value cannot be an empty string and exceed 10240 bytes.
@param { EventData } [data] - Data passed in the event.

parameters.说明: ID of the event to emit. The value cannot be an empty string and exceed 10240 bytes.
Event emit priority.
EventData } [data] - Data passed in the event.

节点.功能描述: Emits an event of a specified priority.
注释信息: @param { string } eventId - ID of the event to emit. The value cannot be an empty string and exceed 10240 bytes.
@param { GenericEventData<T> } [data] - Data passed in the event.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the number of subscriptions to a specified event.
注释信息: @param { number | string } eventId - Event ID. The value of the string type cannot be an empty string.
@returns { number } Returns the number of listener count.

parameters.说明: Event ID. The value of the string type cannot be an empty string.

节点.return_description: Returns the number of listener count.

节点.功能描述: Describes data passed in the event.
Data passed in the event.
Data carried by the event.
